# STRAT.013 ? Lean Startup

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** business_strategy
**Domain:** BUSINESS_STRATEGY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Build-measure-learn loop; validated learning; MVP; pivot or persevere; innovation accounting; continuous deployment

## Application
Test assumptions quickly; minimal viable product; measure real behavior; learn and iterate; pivot when needed; validate before scaling

## Key Values
- Validated learning
- Rapid iteration
- MVP
- Pivot readiness
- Customer feedback

philosophy, strategic-framework, business_strategy
